short_summary: Tren de Aragua strike confirmed; Iran deal risk
rationale: The confirmed US air strike killing the Tren de Aragua gang leader is a concrete government action with domestic security and political relevance; Trump's Iran deal friction is rhetoric only. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in air strike, Trump says
top_events.summary: A confirmed US military air strike killed the leader of the Tren de Aragua gang — a direct domestic security action with real policy implications for immigration and gang enforcement narratives.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's public criticism of Israeli Beirut strikes is rhetoric signaling tension in US-Israel-Iran diplomacy — no confirmed policy change, but could affect oil markets and US Middle East posture.

top_events.title: Twelve killed in plane crash in US state of Missouri
top_events.summary: A fatal plane crash in Missouri killed twelve people — a domestic tragedy with local impact but no systemic policy or economic consequence for most US residents.
